---
title: Books' Summaries
highlight-style: atom-one
listing:
  contents:
    - books-summaries
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, date, title, description]
  page-size: 10
image-align: left
page-layout: full
css: assets/listing.css
---

Summaries of books that have had a significant impact on how I think, view the world, or approach my work. Each summary distills the key ideas and actionable insights that helped me become more effective and efficient in both personal and professional contexts.
